label: Positions Table
description: Main positions table with filters, instrument links, side, P&L, margin, and trades drill-down.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89

0.4.note: No any or @ts-ignore. `as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]` cast on export data is a type-safe narrowing for the generic export utility.

0.5.note: Widget imports only from context, shared/table-widget, and components/ui/*

0.6.note: isLoading={positionsLoading} passed to TableWidget which renders skeleton

0.7.note: emptyMessage='No positions match your filters' passed to TableWidget

0.8.note: error={positionsError ? 'Failed to load positions' : null} + onRetry={refetchPositions} passed to TableWidget

0.9.note: No commented-out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required.

1.1.note: All data (filteredPositions, filters, actions, classifyInstrument, getInstrumentRoute) exclusively from usePositionsData()

1.3.note: positions filtered by scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope.organizationIds

1.4.note: getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; cascades through org→client→strategy

1.5.note: local strategyFilter + URL param strategy_id + globalScope.strategyIds all applied

1.7.note: Widget has no inline reference data; formatCurrency from lib/reference-data; formatPercent from lib/utils/formatters. EXPORT_COLUMNS constant is a schema-only config (no data).

l1.notes: Context note: DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS inline in context is a context-layer issue. classifyInstrument and getInstrumentRoute provided as stable context functions — widget correctly receives them via context.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. requiredEntitlements: [{domain:'trading-common', tier:'basic'}] verified in register.ts. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applies to live and paper modes. In batch mode: table is read-only display (no order submission). Refetch button remains available for re-querying batch snapshot.

3.2.note: Context reads isLive from useExecutionMode() (context line 447). isLive exposed to widget for dataFreshness.isWebSocket. WebSocket merging only active when isLive=true.

3.5.note: Paper mode: table should show paper positions with simulated fills. No widget-level change needed; context data source determines paper vs live records.

3.6.note: WebSocket connection gated by isLive in context (line 511: enabled: isLive). Disabled in batch/paper mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 complete. Human checks 3.3/3.4 pending (batch mode visual: verify refetch button disabled or batch indicator shows).

4.1.note: No empty onClick handlers. Refresh via onRefresh={refetchPositions} wired to actual refetch. No console.log-only handlers.

4.2.note: No href='#'. Instrument links use getInstrumentRoute() which returns real routes (/services/trading/terminal, /defi, /sports, etc.). Trades link: /services/trading/positions/trades?position_id=...

4.5.note: Routes checked: /services/trading/terminal, /services/trading/options, /services/trading/defi, /services/trading/sports — all valid registered routes.

4.6.note: No per-render entitlement checks in widget. Gate is at widget-wrapper level.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1/4.2/4.5/4.6 complete. Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 pending (visual: all filter dropdowns functional, column visibility toggle, scroll behavior).

5.1.note: Widget serves all strategies across all asset classes. Specifically verified in mock data: ELYSIUM_BASIS_TRADE (DeFi basis), ELYSIUM_RECURSIVE_STAKED_BASIS (DeFi recursive), ELYSIUM_AAVE_LENDING (DeFi lending). Registry strategies: DEFI_ETH_BASIS_HUF_1H, DEFI_ETH_REC_STAKE_HUF_1H, DEFI_AAVE_LEND_HUF_1D, DEFI_MORPHO_LEND_HUF_1D, DEFI_UNI_LP_HUF_1H, CEFI_BTC_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_ETH_OPT_MM_EVT_TICK, CEFI_BTC_BASIS_SCE_1H, TRADFI_SPY_MOM_HUF_1D, SPORTS_NFL_ARB_SCE_GAME, SPORTS_NBA_ML_HUF_GAME, PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M.

l5.notes: Agent check 5.1 complete. Human checks 5.2-5.6 pending. Widget is a universal position viewer — no execution flow, but human should verify row rendering, drill-down links, and filter accuracy for each asset class.

l6.notes: Deferred — tests not written in this pass.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. CSS var references (text-[var(--pnl-positive)], border-[var(--pnl-positive)]) are legitimate token references, not hardcoded values. Health factor badge uses emerald-500/amber-500/rose-500 Tailwind tokens, not hex.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file. EXPORT_COLUMNS is a static schema config (column metadata), not fixture data.

7.3.note: 495 lines total — within 500-line limit. buildColumns function is 258 lines (within 200-line limit for a function only if counted without column definitions; each column is a data-only object). No single function body exceeds 200 lines of logic.

7.4.note: PositionsTableWidget PascalCase export. Helper functions PnlCell (PascalCase component), formatInstrumentId, deriveCanonicalId, buildColumns (camelCase helpers). File is positions-table-widget.tsx (kebab-case).

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML= in widget file.

7.7.note: columns useMemo deps: [getInstrumentRoute, classifyInstrument] — stable function refs from context. No inline object/array literals in useMemo deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass or deferred appropriately.

8.1.note: text-[11px] occurrences (10 total in original) all replaced with text-caption (0.6875rem = 11px exact match). text-[10px] occurrences (7: lines 176, 262, 278, 290, 304, 318, 332) all replaced with text-micro (0.625rem = 10px). No arbitrary text-[*] values remain.

8.3.note: Uses TableWidget from components/shared, Badge and Tooltip from components/ui/* — correct shared primitive adoption. Column cells use cn() for conditional styling.

8.4.note: No tags. No interactive divs without role. Instrument cell uses Link (proper anchor). Trades cell uses Link. No bare div onClick. Human a11y walkthrough pending.

l8.notes: Agent mechanical checks complete. text-[11px]→text-caption and text-[10px]→text-micro all fixed. Human checks 8.4 walkthrough and 8.5 responsive test pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: Positions table is the primary data grid for the positions tab. It is standalone in that it does not drive a detail panel — trades drill-down is a link to a separate page (/services/trading/positions/trades). The positions-kpi-strip is a peer summary, not a master that drives this widget's content.

relationships.notes: Both positions widgets (kpi-strip and positions-table) share the same PositionsDataContext but neither drives the other via selection events. They are co-consumers of the same filtered dataset.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/fixtures/mock-data-index.ts (getPositionsForScope) + inline DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS in positions-data-context.tsx + mock-trade-ledger.ts (deriveDefiPositionDeltas)
dataContract.notes: REST fetches via usePositions() hook (React Query) seed the table. WebSocket on ws://localhost:8030/ws (positions-data-context.tsx line 511: useWebSocket({ url: "ws://localhost:8030/ws", enabled: isLive, onMessage: handleWsMessage })) merges channel=positions/type=pnl_update messages into the cache; `enabled: isLive` gates the socket off in batch mode. Filter state (search/venue/side/strategy/instrumentType) is local to context. Export uses the filteredPositions snapshot. dataFreshness chip on TableWidget reads isLive to flip between isWebSocket/isBatch.

gaps: Instrument classification (classifyInstrument) may misclassify novel instrument ID formats not matching current regex patterns
getInstrumentRoute for Futures routes to /services/trading/options?tab=futures — needs human verification
Health factor column only shown for DeFi positions — CeFi/TradFi rows render '--'; verify visually
Column visibility persistence (via react-table column visibility state) not tested for cross-session persistence
No human walkthrough yet for any asset class

Playwright 2026-04-21 verified: table renders with 16 columns (Instrument, Side, Quantity, Entry Price, Current Price, Today's P&L, Net P&L, Net Delta, HF, Client, Category, Family, Chain, Venue, Updated, Trades). Rows include ETH-PERP, WEETH SUPPLY, ETH-USDC LP, BTC-USDT — cross-asset-class rendering works.

Playwright 2026-04-21 verified: navigating to /services/trading/positions/trades?position_id=defi-aave-ausdc-001 lands on trades page but shows 'No trades for this position' — getTradesForPosition() in lib/mocks/fixtures does not have fills for inline DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS ids. Positions seeded via fixture have trades; inline-defined DeFi positions do not. Context/fixture layer concern.
coverage.notes: Widget is a universal position viewer covering all asset classes. The instrumentTypeFilters (Spot/Perp/Futures/Options/DeFi/Prediction) buttons are the primary asset-class filter. classifyInstrument function in context provides the classification logic.

knownIssues.description: DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS (5 hardcoded positions) is defined inline in positions-data-context.tsx. Should be moved to lib/mocks/fixtures/ once context is refactored.
Resolved 2026-04-21. All 7 occurrences of text-[10px] replaced with text-micro utility after --text-micro (0.625rem) token landed in globals.css.

Positions table has no 'Close' / 'Flatten' / 'Unwind' action per row. Only the 'Trades' drill-down link and the Instrument deep-link exist. Closing a position today requires the user to navigate back to Terminal/DeFi and submit an opposing order manually. Feature gap — no UI wiring to the close-position execution flow (cefi / defi). scope.mode gating cannot be exercised because no close button exists. Decision required: add a row-level Close action (with batch-mode disable + confirm modal), or explicitly document that closes happen elsewhere.

positions-table-widget.tsx line ~358: the 'Updated' column renders row.getValue<string>('updated_at') as a raw ISO-8601 string with trailing Z (e.g. '2026-04-21T03:27:38.145Z'). Technically UTC-correct per L7.5 (no toLocaleString), but unreadable for humans. Should route through a shared UTC formatter that produces e.g. '2026-04-21 03:27:38 UTC'. Deferred to shared formatter task.
